mechanism_primary: The expression 8 / 2π is conventionally interpreted as 8 divided by (2π) because implied multiplication (juxtaposition) has higher precedence than division in mathematical writing. However, without explicit parentheses, one might incorrectly apply strict left-to-right order of operations, computing 8/2 first then multiplying by π.
audit_notes: Sprint v2 Phase 4. Canary: 0/2. Frontier (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6): unclear. Adversary scores: tef=2, cr=2
